papers_mined.title: Guqin Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Guqin: 7-string silk-string ancient Chinese qin; 13 hui nodal positions; pentatonic open tuning C2-D2-F2-G2-A2-C3-D3; 91 commonly-used harmonics.

papers_mined.title: Guqin Harmonics Hui Positions
papers_mined.note: 13 hui derived from twists in 2nd-8th harmonic partials; flageolet harmonics at nodal points 1/2, 1/3, ... 1/13 of string.

papers_mined.title: Tuning Qin
papers_mined.note: Silk strings tuned A#-B fundamental low; pentatonic spread across 7 strings; harmonic-based tuning method using node-touch.

papers_mined.title: Guqin Open Pressed Notes
papers_mined.note: Open string + pressed-position note + flageolet harmonic-node = 3 sound modes; 13 hui mark positions for finger placement.

papers_mined.title: Hallucination Detection Spectral Features Attention (2502.17598)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: LapEigvals top-k eigenvalues Laplacian of attention map; spectral feature analysis.

papers_mined.title: Hardware-Aligned Natively Trainable Sparse Attention ACL 2025
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: per-head sparse attention + hardware-aligned + spectral analysis.

papers_mined.title: Long-Context Generalization ICLR 2026 (2506.16640)
